objective: Refactor lib toward explicit root entrypoints/facades plus focused shared contracts/helpers. Root keeps app.dart compatibility facade plus main.dart and main_e2e.dart entrypoints; implementation lives under app/, core/, features/, router/, shared/, testing/, theme/. Shared-code objective extracted/reused Navivox wire JSON coercion, strict bool token parsing, profile health parsing, endpoint URI normalization contracts, and presentation policies across gateway channel, pairing/config/profile UI, setup QR import, transcript composer, and test support while preserving root topology.
completedSlices: Extracted shared Navivox wire JSON coercion helpers to lib/core/protocol/navivox_json.dart and reused them from gateway and memory protocol decoders.
Moved NavivoxApp implementation from root lib/app.dart to lib/app/navivox_app.dart while keeping lib/app.dart as public compatibility export.
Extracted E2EMockChannel from lib/main_e2e.dart to lib/testing/e2e_mock_channel.dart so the root e2e entrypoint remains thin.
Extracted endpoint URI normalization helpers to lib/core/protocol/navivox_endpoint_uri.dart and reused them from gateway pairing parsing and setup QR import parsing.

Extracted NavivoxGatewayConfig to lib/core/gateway/navivox_gateway_config.dart and NavivoxPairingDescriptor to lib/core/protocol/navivox_pairing_descriptor.dart; kept lib/core/gateway/navivox_gateway_protocol.dart compatibility exports and updated setup QR parsing to import the focused pairing descriptor contract directly.
Extracted shared profile health label policy to lib/shared/presentation/profile_health_labels.dart and reused it from profile contacts, settings, chat screen, and voice readiness presentations.
Extracted shared count-label helper to lib/shared/presentation/count_labels.dart and reused it from settings, servers overview, and chat project status presentation.

Reused existing Navivox JSON coercion helpers from lib/core/protocol/navivox_json.dart in profile seed sheet, profile voice profile card, and transcript run-record presentation instead of local duplicate map/string/list coercion.

Extracted shared profile contact label/status policy to lib/shared/presentation/profile_contact_labels.dart and reused it from memory dashboard scope/error labels and chat screen profile status/project labels.

Extracted shared voice-unavailable presentation policy to lib/shared/presentation/voice_unavailable_presentation.dart and reused canonical reason, recovery/help copy, and voice-settings subtitle policy from voice readiness and transcript composer UI.

Extracted core voice-unavailable reason contract to lib/core/protocol/voice_unavailable_reason.dart and reused constants/canonicalization across core channel state, speech services, voice controllers, and UI presentation while keeping the existing shared presentation export compatible.

Extended lib/core/protocol/navivox_json.dart with navivoxTrimmedStringList and navivoxTrimmedStringFields; reused them in gateway memory URI params, memory action body construction, profile seed workspace roots, and pairing descriptor CSV/optional params.

Extended lib/core/protocol/navivox_json.dart with navivoxMapFieldFromJson, navivoxListFieldFromJson, navivoxStringFieldFromJson, and navivoxStringListFieldFromJson; reused them in profile seed sheet, profile voice profile card, transcript run-record presentation, config form schema list parsing, and gateway channel string/int/date/list parsing wrappers.

Extracted config schema/validation wire string and alias helpers to lib/features/config/form/config_wire_fields.dart; reused them in config form schema rows/sections/secret labels, config field presentation, and config apply validation/secret draft parsing.

Added navivoxStrictBoolFromJson in lib/core/protocol/navivox_json.dart and reused it from gateway channel bool decoding, pairing descriptor token_required parsing, profile seed workspace suggestion flags, and test support.
Added navivoxProfileHealthFromJson in lib/core/channel/navivox_channel.dart and reused it from gateway channel and test support profile-contact parsing.
Added endpoint string normalization contracts in lib/core/protocol/navivox_endpoint_uri.dart and reused them from setup QR import base/websocket normalization with focused endpoint tests.
Reused existing navivoxOptionalStringFromJson from lib/core/protocol/navivox_json.dart in transcript composer voice recovery action trimming, replacing a local one-off helper.
validationReceipts: flutter analyze: failed due existing unrelated warnings in unmodified test files (unnecessary/unused imports in test/core/gateway/navivox_gateway_protocol_test.dart, test/features/agents/screens/agents_screen_test.dart, test/features/chat/screens/chat_forward_message_test.dart, test/features/chat/screens/chat_run_record_inspection_test.dart, test/features/chat/transcript/surface/message_actions_test.dart, test/features/chat/transcript/widgets/transcript_run_record_sheet_test.dart).
